summary: Plan authoritative map topology recovery after product-owner rejection of grid-like map substrate
acceptance_criteria: Record the product-owner third REQUEST_CHANGES: the map problem is authoritative topology, not only visual presentation; a rectangular/grid substrate visually disguised as irregular land is unacceptable.
Synthesize the gameplay_designer mature-game topology research into an auditable ADR recommending an irregular District/Province polygon surface plus explicit route/transport graph.
Explain why visual disguise over rectangular topology fails for adjacency, distance, route capacity, AI reason codes, hit testing, save compatibility, determinism, and player mental model.
Create a bounded downstream recovery task chain for topology schema, fixture/content migration, client surface integration, and validation before formal content lock can be reconsidered.

Keep M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 blocked with content_lock_accepted=false and prevent M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 from starting until topology recovery validation passes and the product owner reconsiders content lock.

Do not modify product code, package code, content-source data, tools, CI, prior gate docs, roadmap, acceptance matrix, production art, server/multiplayer, telemetry, cloud save, manual node battle, or release/commercial scope in this planning task.
required_tests: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7 map topology recovery files
notes: This task is created from a product-owner REQUEST_CHANGES during formal M7 content-lock reconsideration.
The accepted direction is not high-fidelity art; it is a low-fidelity but authoritative strategic map substrate.
ADR-010 is PROPOSED until systems_architect and independent qa_reviewer accept this package.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and is not reopened by this map topology work.
Historical Southeast Asia district borders, ports, river importance, and route claims remain RESEARCH REQUIRED before formal historical content is asserted.
No GIS, server, Rust/WASM, multiplayer, telemetry, account, paid service, production art, or commercial/release decision is authorized.

gameplay_research_summary.recommendation: Use irregular District/Province polygons for governance surface plus explicit Route/Transport graph for movement, supply, obligation delivery, AI pathing, and map explanations.
rejected: rectangular grid disguised as irregular polygon
hex tiles as authoritative grand-strategy map
engine navmesh as authoritative political map

next_action: Route ADR/task-chain package to systems_architect, then independent qa_reviewer; only after acceptance and main integration can M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 become READY.
